implementationGuidelines.colorConsistency: Use exact hex codes provided for brand consistency across all document types
implementationGuidelines.typographyHierarchy: Maintain size relationships between heading levels in all formats
implementationGuidelines.spacingStandards: Follow specified point measurements for professional appearance
implementationGuidelines.crossDocumentConsistency: Ensure themes are visually cohesive across resumes, cover letters, and KSC responses
implementationGuidelines.accessibility: Maintain high contrast ratios for all color combinations

kscResponseFormattingStandards.bulletPoints: Use theme-specific styling for sub-points within STAR components

customizationOptions: Font size adjustments based on word limits
Brand color integration while maintaining theme integrity
technicalConsiderations: Use vector graphics where possible for crisp PDF rendering across all document types
Test color combinations for accessibility compliance in all themes
Ensure proper font embedding in PDF generation for all typography
Maintain consistent leading and kerning across resumes, cover letters, and KSC responses
Consider print vs. digital optimization based on submission requirements
